name: create_docx
description: Creates a professional Word (.docx) document with title, headings, paragraphs, bullet lists and tables. Returns the file path. You MUST include [FILE:path] in your answer after using this tool.

filename.description: Output filename (without path), e.g. 'documento.docx'. Will be saved in ./output/

content.description: Document content. Use \n for line breaks, ## for section headers (Heading 2), ### for subsections (Heading 3), - for bullet points, | for table columns (first row = headers, one row per line)
